title: Lesson Classifier Engine: Motor de Classificação Mão → Aula
plan: Read all 25 RegLife PDFs in /classes/ to extract exact detection rules, ranges, sizings, and evaluation criteria per lesson
Extend hand_lessons schema if needed to support street, executed_correctly, and confidence fields (or encode in notes JSON)
Create LessonMatch dataclass and LessonClassifier class in src/analyzers/lesson_classifier.py with classify_hand() method
Implement preflop detection methods: RFI, 3-Bet, Squeeze, Open Shove, Blind War, BB Defense, Reaction to 3-Bet (7 lessons)
Implement postflop detection methods: CBet IP/OOP, Facing CBet, Check-Raise, Delayed CBet, Probe, Bet vs Missed CBet, 3-Bet Pot Postflop (14 lessons)
Implement execution evaluation rules per lesson based on PDF-extracted criteria (correct/partial/incorrect)
Add bulk classify pipeline method that processes all hands and persists results to hand_lessons table
Add CLI command 'python main.py classify' with options for specific hands/lessons/force-reclassify
Create comprehensive tests in tests/test_lesson_classifier.py with real hand data covering each detection type
Validate acceptance criteria: at least 15 of 25 lessons classified, multi-lesson per hand, executed_correctly evaluation
